title: Refugee Resettlement Services - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Refugee Resettlement Services 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF AFGHAN SUPPORT NETWORK CULTURALLY SPECIFIC COMMUNITY ORGANIZATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information, referral, and resource navigation to the Afghan refugee and immigrant community. 10865 SW 5th Street #250 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Individuals and families who identify as Afghan Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 662-8252 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CATHOLIC CHARITIES REFUGEE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive services for newly arrived refugees, asylees, Special Immigrant Visa (SIV) holders, foreign born victims of trafficking, or Cuban/Haitian entrants. Program staff and community volunteers work to meet refugees' basic needs, including shelter, furnishings, food, and clothing. Case Managers facilitate referrals to other service providers and encourage refugee newcomers towards self-sufficiency through obtaining safe and secure housing, cultural orientation classes, applying for health insurance, employment services, English language classes, public assistance, and school enrollment. 2740 SE Powell Boulevard #5 Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Must have documentation present confirming their status (Refugee, Asylum-seeker, Asylee, SIV, foreign born victims of trafficking, or Cuban or Haitian entrant) and must have been in the US for less than 60 months from date of status granted. Most services can be rendered up to 2 years in total. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (971) 222-1883 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ECUMENICAL MINISTRIES OF OREGON ECUMENICAL MINISTRIES OF OREGON SOAR PORTLAND SPONSORS ORGANIZED TO ASSIST REFUGEES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive and direct resettlement services, case management, and advocacy to help refugees build new lives. Also provides global and cultural education to help raise awareness in the community about refugees and the lives they were forced to leave behind. Volunteers needed for English language tutoring, transportation, and office assistance. 7931 NE Halsey Street Suite 302 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Individuals who are refugees Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 284-3002 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST PORTLAND OFFICE REFUGEE RECEPTION AND PLACEMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case management services assisting with processing paperwork, signing up for government assistance programs, information about employment programs, ESL classes, and other barriers in regard to refugee status. Additionally provides a sponsor based accommodation program. 7931 NE Halsey Street Suite 200 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Refugees who have been in the US for a period of 8 months or less Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-2:30pm Email (971) 888-7831 Get Directions Visit Website More Details AFGHAN SUPPORT NETWORK CULTURALLY SPECIFIC COMMUNITY ORGANIZATIONS CATHOLIC CHARITIES REFUGEE SERVICES ECUMENICAL MINISTRIES OF OREGON SPONSORS ORGANIZED TO ASSIST REFUGEES LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST REFUGEE RECEPTION AND PLACEMENT PROGRAM
